summary: Gradačac City Map Update Testing Complete - All tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Nearby offers banner appears with GPS showing offers within 500m radius. 2) Admin/Business buttons removed from main map controls - only QR, heart (about), and locate buttons visible. 3) Search bar and map controls properly sized without overlap. 4) /admin and /business routes accessible via direct URL. Backend API /api/offers/nearby working correctly with distance filtering and sorting.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: GET /api/offers/nearby endpoint working correctly (lines 319-334 in server.py)
✓ Backend: Endpoint accepts lat, lng, radius parameters with proper validation
✓ Backend: Returns offers with location_name, location_image, distance fields
✓ Backend: Offers filtered by distance <= radius and sorted by distance ascending
✓ Backend: Default radius is 500m when not specified
✓ Frontend: checkNearbyOffers function calls API when userLoc is available (lines 76-85 in index.tsx)
✓ Frontend: Nearby banner UI implemented with green background, location icon, title (lines 254-274)
✓ Frontend: Banner shows up to 2 offers with title, location name, distance, discount badge
✓ Frontend: Close button (testID='close-nearby') removes banner by setting showNearbyBanner to false
✓ Frontend: Clicking nearby offer navigates to /location/{location_id}
✓ Frontend: Map controls show ONLY 3 buttons - QR (blue, testID='qr-scan-btn'), About (orange, testID='about-btn'), Locate (white, testID='locate-btn')
✓ Frontend: Admin button removed from map controls (no testID='admin-btn')
✓ Frontend: Business button removed from map controls (no testID='biz-panel-btn')
✓ Frontend: Search bar positioned at top without overlapping category grid
✓ Frontend: /admin route accessible via direct URL - admin login page loads
✓ Frontend: /business route accessible via direct URL - business login page loads
✓ Code quality: All interactive elements have testID attributes
✓ Code quality: React Native components used correctly
✓ Code quality: Mobile-first design with proper spacing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing offers from database (4 offers within 500m of Gradačac center).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Update successfully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) Nearby offers banner appears on homepage when user has GPS and offers exist within 500m radius. Banner shows green background with 'Ponude u blizini!' heading, displays up to 2 offers with location name, distance, and discount percentage. Close button (X) removes banner. Clicking offer navigates to location detail. 2) Admin and Business buttons removed from main map controls - now only shows QR (blue), heart/about (orange), and locate (white) buttons. Admin and business panels still accessible via direct URLs /admin and /business. 3) Search bar and map controls properly sized without overlap. All previous features verified working (categories, offers, events, attractions, leaderboard).
